description: Style Note baggit was founded in 1990 and since then has created a name in the market for fighting against cruelty to animals. A practical and stylish choice of bag in navy blue with extra roomy space and comfortable to carry, this blended polyester bag will give a sophisticated look to any casual outfit. Product Details Navy blue bag with one main zipped compartment that has an inner zipped pocket Two short handles for carrying ease Ruched at the back and branding on the front Material and Care Blended polyester Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Do not store in direct sunlight Size Height: 29 cm Width: 39 cm
